mission.title: fluentd: Standard way for nested record support
mission.description: Standard way for nested record support. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current fluentd deployment
steps.description:
Verify your fluentd version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd
helm list -n fluentd 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working fluentd installation.

steps.title: Review fluentd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluentd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd
kubectl get configmap -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluentd
```
This is for fixing #649, #902 and related issues.

Currently, many plugins can't handle nested record because there is no standard way.
Many users want to access nested record. For example, grep, rewrite-tag-filter, parser and more plugins.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Standard way for nested record support
steps.description:
Additional feature for `record_accessor`.
This is useful for several mutation plugins.

Ref #1578
```yaml
regexp1 key1 cool  #record['key1']`
regexp2 $.key1.key2[0] hot # record['key1']['key2'][0]
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd
kubectl get events -n fluentd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Standard way for nested record support" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Additional feature for `record_accessor`.
This is useful for several mutation plugins.

Ref #1578
codeSnippets:
regexp1 key1 cool  #record['key1']`
regexp2 $.key1.key2[0] hot # record['key1']['key2'][0]

regexp1 key1 cool  #record['key1']`
regexp2 key1.key2.0 hot # record['key1']['key2'][0]

regexp1 key1 cool  #record['key1']`
regexp2 ['key1', 'key2', 0] hot # record['key1']['key2'][0]

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluentd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
